titleStmt.title: SII 26.722: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 722. (A.R. No. 671 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartin (Jaṭāº Sundarapāṇḍya I): Year 10, Mīṉam (Paṅguṉi) śu. 9, Wednesday, Hastam = Irregular.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records that the land in Māṅkāṉam purchased from the residents of the place by the ūr of Kiḷiyūr of Vaḍakavi-nāḍu, was sold as Tirunāmattukkāṇi by the same ūr to the temple of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam-uḍaiyār of Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu. The price of the land is stated as 12,000 kāśu or 400 paṇam. It is stated that the land belonged to a certain Viḻupparaiyar of Karuppūr, to Kīḷanallūr-kiḻavar Miḻichchuraṅgum-perumāḷ and to a certain Kāṇiyāḷar. It is stated that the land was made tax-free. In the description of the boundaries Puduvayal, Oppilāmulaināchchiyār's Kuḍikkāḍu, Nambūr and Kaḍaiyakkuḍi figure. A number of residents of Kiḷiyūr figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ tiripuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī yāṇṭu pattāvatu mīṉanāyaṟṟu [pūrvapakṣa]ttu navamiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ pāṇ(ṭ)ṭikulapativaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiyār koyil Ādicaṇḍeśvaratevakaṉmikaḷukku Iṉ ṉāṭṭu puṟakkiḷiyūrā ḷāvaṇa vilaipiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Iṉnāṭṭu māṅkāṉam māṅkāṉam muṭaiyārkaḷ pakkal nāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭa vaiyiṟālum Ūril Uḷḷa
kāṇiyāḷar kāliṅ ya kaḷḷuruṭaṉe yāṟum Ivūr pāḻum payirumāy Āṇ(ṭ)ṭutoṟum nāṭaṟamatiyāti kaṭamai pūṇṭatukku Uṭalnikki tuṇṭamāy nāṅkaḷ neṭunāḷpaṭa tuppotukaiyālum karuppūruṭaiyār keraḷāṉtaka viḻupparayarkku kāṇiāṉa Oṉṟu pa tāyā peṟṟa nilam muṉṟe Eḻumāvaraiyum kiḷanallūr kiḻavar miḻic cuṟaṅkum perumāḷ kāṇiyāṉa nilam Iraṇṭaraiye Araikkālum kāṇi
yāḷar nilamāy ṉta Oṉṟupātiyumuṭppaṭa Ipperkaḷil Ivvāṇṭu kaṭamaikku muṉ(p)pilāṇṭu Iṟuttuṭaimaikku muṭalāka Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṅkaḷ viṟṟu Immāṅkāṉattil Ūrnattattukkum viḷainilattukkum puṉceykaḷum koṭṭakattukkum Icaiṉ(t)ta kiḻpāṟkellai kiḷivākkālukkum veṇṇukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Iṉnāyaṉār tevatāṉam
tiruneṭuṅkaḷattellaikku Iṉnāyaṉār tevatāṉam putuvayal Ellaikkum nācciyār Oppilāmulai nācciyār kuṭikkāṭṭellaikkum kāṇippaṟṟum mutal tāṉamumāṉa Ellaikkum ciṅkāṇṭāṉ kuṭikkāṭṭellaikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nāmpūr Ellaikkum kaṭaiyakkuṭi Ellaikkum Iṉnāṉkellaiyil naṭuvupaṭṭa mikitikuṟai Uḷ(p)paṭṭa Ūrnattamum viḷainilamum puṉceyyum kuḷamum koṭṭakamum potta
ṉattamum nikki Uḷḷa pottakappaṭi nilattup perum mākkāṭum Uḷppaṟai pāḻum Uvaṟ koti pāḻum viḷainilam naṉcey kuḷamum koṭṭakamum mikutikkuṟai Uḷ(p)paṭa Iṟṟai nāḷāl tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu paṉṉirāyirattukku
vilaippaṇam nānūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kā kaic celavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Iṉnāṉkellaiyuḷ melnokkiṉa māmum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum potuvum potātayum maṟṟum yepperpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭ(p)paṭa tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka kallum veṭṭi kuṭuttu Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇi kuṭuttom kiḷiyūr Ūravarom Ivarkaḷ colla Ivvilaippiramāṇa
Icaivu tiṭṭu Eḻutineṉ miniyam muṭaiyāṉ taṉaipperumāṉ makaṉ puvaṉāpati nāyakaṉ Eḻuttu kiḷiyūrk kaṇakku kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ periyanāyaṉ mātuyar matittāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ peṟṟāṇṭāṉāṉa ceḻiyakaṅkaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ Aravaṉ tirukkāṭṭuppaḷḷi Uṭaiyāṉeḻuttu kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ Aravaṉ Iṭarkaḷaivāṉāṉa kurukulattaraiyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai marutūruṭaiyāṉ koṉcolaivuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu cāyakkuṭaiyā
ṉ Iḷayāṉāparaṇattarayaṉeḻuttu yivar tam(p)pi tāyaṉeḻuttu māṅkāṉamuṭaiyāṉ coḻaṉ Am m pāṇṭāṉ vaṭakavināṭṭu viḻupparaiyaṉeḻuttu poṉtuḻāṉ tiruvekampa nāyakaṉeḻuttu kumāramaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉampalavaṉ kūttāṭuvāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Araiyaṉ keyamāṇikkaccaruppetimaṅkalattu celvanam(p)piyeṉ koṭṭattu Irāmaneṉ komaṭattu mutaliyeṉ
Digital edition of SII 26.722 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
